name: DriveItem
description: Represents a file, folder, or other item stored in a drive.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item within the drive.

name.description: The name of the item (filename and extension).

description.description: A user-visible description of the item.

size.description: Size of the item in bytes.

webUrl.description: URL that displays the resource in the browser.

webDavUrl.description: WebDAV compatible URL for the item.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time of item creation.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the item was last modified.

cTag.description: ETag for the content of the item.
